person.name: Thibault de Bar
person.alternateName: Thibauld de Bar-Sur-Seine Seigneur de Pierrepont

memoryArtifacts.headline: Bar d'azur semé de croisettes d'or et aux deux bars d'or.

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Armoiries de la famille de Bar (Lorraine) :
D'azur semé de croisettes d'or aux deux bars adossés d'or.
Theobald de Bar (French: Thibauld/Thiebaut de Bar), Seigneur de Pierrepont. He was one of six children born to Erard of Bar, Seigneur de Pierrepont et d'Ancerville (himself son of Theobald II of Bar), and Isabelle of Lorraine (daughter of Theobald II, Duke of Lorraine).

In 1340, he married Marie de Namur (daughter of John I, of Dampierre and Marie of Artois), after her first husband Henry II, Graf of Vianden was murdered at Famagusta three years before. His wife, Marie gave birth to two daughters, Yolande and Elisabeth. When Theobald, died (between 2 August 1353 and 6 July 1354) he had no legitimate male heir, thus his daughter Elisabeth became the heiress of Bar-Pierrepont.

Issue
1.) Yolande de Bar (b. c. 1343- d. c. 1410) married before 1360 with Eudes VII, Sire de Grancey, Louvois, Pierrepont.

2.) Elisabeth (Isabel) de Bar (b. c 1345-d. before 11 May 1411) married before 18 Oct 1360 with Otto, Lord of Arkel.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thibault de Bar於1314年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇納姆爾時，他的父親Erard of Bar52歲，母親Isabella Of Lorraine34歲。他和Marie de Namur de Dampierre至少有2個女兒。他去世於1354年7月2日在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒皮朋特享年40歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒皮朋特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Thibault
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Thibault de Bar was born in 1314, in Namur, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Erard of Bar, was 52 and his mother, Isabella Of Lorraine, was 34. He had at least 2 daughters with Marie de Namur de Dampierre. He died on 2 July 1354, in Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, at the age of 40, and was buried in Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thibault de Bar est né en 1314, à Namur, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Erard of Bar, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Isabella Of Lorraine, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Marie de Namur de Dampierre. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1354, à Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thibault de Bar 1314 in Namen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Erard of Bar 52 und seine Mutter Isabella Of Lorraine 34. Er hatte mit Marie de Namur de Dampierre mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juli 1354 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich und wurde in Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thibault de Bar è nato il nel 1314 nel Namur, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Erard of Bar, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Of Lorraine, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Marie de Namur de Dampierre. Morì il 2 luglio 1354, nel Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thibault de Barが1314年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチナムルで生まれた時，父Erard of Barは52歳，母Isabella Of Lorraineは34歳であった。彼はMarie de Namur de Dampierreとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1354年7月2日にフランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルピエレプオントで40歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルピエレプオントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thibault de Bar(이)가 1314년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Erard of Bar(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Of Lorraine(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Marie de Namur de Dampierre(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1354년 7월 2일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 피레폰트에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 피레폰트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thibault de Bar nasceu em 1314, em Namur, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Erard of Bar, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Of Lorraine, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Marie de Namur de Dampierre. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1354, em Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thibault de Bar родился в 1314 г. в местности намур, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Erard of Bar было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Of Lorraine, 34. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Marie de Namur de Dampierre. Он умер 2 июля 1354 г. в местности пьиррепонт, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности пьиррепонт, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thibault de Bar nació en 1314, en Namur, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Erard of Bar, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Isabella Of Lorraine, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Marie de Namur de Dampierre. Murió el 2 de julio de 1354, en Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Pierrepont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia.
